.gitignore.general_idea: Add gitignore entries for environment configuration, release note generation artifacts, and Playwright e2e test outputs.

docker-compose.yaml.general_idea: Remove hardcoded default versions from image tags to enforce explicit version management via environment variables.
Add Zeebe broker authentication and multi-tenancy configuration for Identity integration.
Expose Zeebe REST API port for client communication.
Add healthcheck for Zeebe service to ensure readiness before dependent services start.
Update Operate service to use Identity-based authentication and correct internal URLs.
Add healthcheck and management endpoints for Operate service.
Update Tasklist service to use Identity-based authentication and correct internal URLs.
Add healthcheck and management endpoints for Tasklist service.
Configure Connectors service with Identity authentication and Zeebe client credentials.
Add healthcheck and management endpoints for Connectors service.
Update Optimize service to use Identity-based authentication and correct internal URLs.
Add healthcheck and management endpoints for Optimize service.
Configure Identity service with PostgreSQL database connection details.
Update Keycloak initialization URLs to use HOST variable instead of localhost for external access.
Add Zeebe client configuration to Keycloak initialization for machine-to-machine authentication.
Fix Identity service healthcheck to use wget and correct port.
Add camunda-platform network to Identity and Keycloak services for cross-network communication.
Add temporary volume mounts for Operate and Tasklist to support Zeebe client auth caching.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the compiler source/target remains at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.3.0, which requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x APIs and does not support the newer dependency management structure required for the migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy spring-zeebe-starter with the new spring-boot-starter-camunda.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old starter artifact is deprecated/removed in newer Camunda versions and incompatible with Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy spring-zeebe-test dependency with the new spring-boot-starter-camunda-test.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old test starter is incompatible with the new Camunda Spring Boot starter and Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update springdoc-openapi to version 2.x which supports Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE.
pom.xml.why_exists: springdoc-openapi 1.x relies on javax.servlet and is incompatible with Spring Boot 3's jakarta.servlet namespace.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove dependencies that are no longer compatible or necessary in the new Camunda/Spring Boot 3 stack.
pom.xml.why_exists: These artifacts (e.g., zeebe-client-java, zeebe-dmn, keycloak-spring-boot-starter) are either superseded by the new starter or incompatible with the new namespace/versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove JDK version-specific profiles that are no longer needed since the project now targets only JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The profiles referenced deprecated test artifacts (spring-zeebe-test-testcontainer) that are no longer available or needed.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Remove the deprecated @EnableZeebeClient annotation as it is no longer required in newer Camunda Spring Boot starters.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: The annotation @EnableZeebeClient may be removed or deprecated in newer versions of the Camunda Spring Boot starter, causing compilation errors or warnings if retained.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Remove explicit exclusion of SecurityAutoConfiguration from SpringBootApplication.
Remove unused Swagger/OpenAPI bean configuration and related imports.
Replace old process variable fields with new ones to align with updated business logic.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.after:
private String businessKey;
  private Boolean result;

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Remove unused imports for List and Map after removing fields that used them.
Remove dependency on Camunda Operate client and service to simplify the controller.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: The OperateService and related DTOs are removed from the project scope, causing compilation errors if references remain.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Remove unused Java utility imports no longer needed after removing Operate logic.
Remove custom security annotation import as it is no longer used on endpoints.
Add imports for new process constants and variables classes.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: The controller now uses ProcessConstants and ProcessVariables, requiring these imports to compile.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Remove @CrossOrigin annotation from the controller class.
Update the base request mapping path for the controller.
Remove OperateService field from the controller.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: The field is no longer injected or used, and the class is removed from the project.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Simplify constructor by removing OperateService injection.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: The constructor signature must match the remaining dependencies; OperateService is no longer available.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Refactor startProcessInstance to use constant process ID and typed variables.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: The method signature and implementation must align with the new ProcessVariables class and constant usage.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Refactor publishMessage to use typed variables and remove security annotation.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.why_exists: The method signature must align with the new ProcessVariables class.
The endpoint relied on OperateService which has been removed from the project.
